items.summary: The Yankees announced that they have selected right-hander Yovanny Cruz to their major league roster. Cruz, 26, was originally an international signee of the Cubs […]

items.title: The Yankees’ Other Young Ace In The Making
items.summary: If you weren’t familiar with Cam Schlittler before this season, I’m sure you are now. The 25-year-old owns an AL-leading 1.35 ERA across nine starts.
